---
title: "harvest_responses.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/harvest_responses.py"
loc: 78
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.40
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 7.55
overall_score: 5.55
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating ResponseRecorder, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import ResponseRecorder and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 15 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)
- [google](file://google)

### Exports
- `ResponseRecorder`
- `__init__`
- `record_call`
- `save`
- `Harvester`
- `execute`
